message:
test(animation): add 48 edge-case tests for modal animation system (bd-a4n4z)

Cover: easing edge cases (EaseInOut at 0.5 boundary, Back overshoot
verification, EaseIn/EaseOut endpoints, can_overshoot), exit animation
methods (final_scale/opacity/y_offset for all variants, scale/opacity/
y_offset_at_progress), entrance None instant values, SlideDown/SlideUp
height clamping at 8, zero modal height y_offset, config builder chain,
min_scale clamping to [0.5, 1.0], is_disabled, effective() with/without
reduced motion + respect_reduced_motion=false, current_values helper for
Open and Closed, tick noop on Open/Closed phases, tick returns false mid-
animation, closing completes to Closed, idempotent start_opening/closing,
default state equals new(), backdrop_no_animation, entrance progress
clamping, force_open/close during animation, eased_progress/backdrop for
Open/Closed, Default variants for all enums, config none fields, state
visibility/closed/open/animating lifecycle, Clone/Debug trait coverage
for all types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
